${modID}:ExampleCard.NAME: Name
${modID}:ExampleCard.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: This will automatically be used if the card is upgraded. Remove it if unneeded.
EXTENDED_DESCRIPTION: You can put more text in here.
If you need to use it for stuff.
Blizzard is a good example for this.

${modID}:Collateral.NAME: Collateral
${modID}:Collateral.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage to all enemies. NL Draw !M! Card.

${modID}:Shank.NAME: Shank
${modID}:Shank.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Increase the damage of ALL Shank cards by !M! this combat.

${modID}:Overheat.NAME: Overheat
${modID}:Overheat.DESCRIPTION: Gain !M! energy. NL Add a Burn into your discard pile.

${modID}:RigtheDeck.NAME: Rig the Deck
${modID}:RigtheDeck.DESCRIPTION: Place a card from your discard pile on top of your draw pile.
${modID}:RigtheDeck.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Place a card from your discard pile in your hand.

${modID}:FrontierJustice.NAME: Frontier Justice
${modID}:FrontierJustice.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL If this kills an enemy gain [E] [E] [E].

${modID}:Desperado.NAME: Desperado
${modID}:Desperado.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Add a copy of this card into your discard pile.
${modID}:Desperado.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Add a copy of this card into your discard pile. NL Retain.

${modID}:CoverUp.NAME: Cover Up
${modID}:CoverUp.DESCRIPTION: If you have no Block, gain !B! Block.

${modID}:FirstMove.NAME: First Move
${modID}:FirstMove.DESCRIPTION: Innate. NL Gain !M! Focus. NL At the end of this turn, lose !M! Focus.

${modID}:Intimidate.NAME: Intimidate
${modID}:Intimidate.DESCRIPTION: Apply !M! Weak to ALL enemies. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:ReflexFire.NAME: Reflex Fire
${modID}:ReflexFire.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL Whenever you are attacked this turn, deal !M! damage back.

${modID}:Deadweight.NAME: Deadweight
${modID}:Deadweight.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL If this card is Exhausted. NL Gain [E] [E].
${modID}:Deadweight.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL If this card is Exhausted. NL Gain [E] [E] [E].

${modID}:ItsHighNoon.NAME: It's High Noon
${modID}:ItsHighNoon.DESCRIPTION: Load !M! shot for each enemy in combat. NL Exhaust.
${modID}:ItsHighNoon.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Innate. NL Load !M! shot for each enemy in combat. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:Rebuttal.NAME: Rebuttal
${modID}:Rebuttal.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you receive unblocked attack damage, Load !M! Bullet.

${modID}:Scrounge.NAME: Scrounge
${modID}:Scrounge.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Draw !M! cards. NL Discard all cards drawn this way that do not cost 0.

${modID}:AnteUp.NAME: Ante Up
${modID}:AnteUp.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Put the next card you play this turn on top of your draw pile.

${modID}:Strays.NAME: Strays
${modID}:Strays.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage to a random enemy twice.

${modID}:Disarm.NAME: Disarm
${modID}:Disarm.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL If the enemy intends to attack, apply !M! Weak.

${modID}:HotPotato.NAME: Hot Potato
${modID}:HotPotato.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Draw !M! card. NL Discard !M! card.

${modID}:TakeCover.NAME: Take Cover
${modID}:TakeCover.DESCRIPTION: Gain Block equal to !M! times the number of Bullets Loaded this combat.

${modID}:Mulligan.NAME: Mulligan
${modID}:Mulligan.DESCRIPTION: Exhaust any number of cards, then draw that many. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:PowerPlay.NAME: Power Play
${modID}:PowerPlay.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you play a Power card, Load !M! Bullet.
${modID}:PowerPlay.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Innate. NL Whenever you play a Power card, Load !M! Bullet.

${modID}:Prefire.NAME: Prefire
${modID}:Prefire.DESCRIPTION: At the start of your turn, trigger the passive ability of your next Bullet.

${modID}:PhotonBlaster.NAME: Photon Blaster
${modID}:PhotonBlaster.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Load !M! Photon Bullet. NL Exhaust.
${modID}:PhotonBlaster.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Load !M! Photon Bullets. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:OlReliable.NAME: Ol' Reliable
${modID}:OlReliable.DESCRIPTION: Fire your next Bullet X times.
${modID}:OlReliable.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Fire your next Bullet X+1 times.

${modID}:ExtraShot.NAME: Extra Shot
${modID}:ExtraShot.DESCRIPTION: This turn, your next Bullet Loaded is Loaded twice.
${modID}:ExtraShot.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: This turn, your next !M! Bullets Loaded are Loaded twice.

${modID}:JunkDrawer.NAME: Junk Drawer
${modID}:JunkDrawer.DESCRIPTION: Channel !M! [B] Bullet. NL Channel !M! [R] Bullet. NL Channel !M! [G] Bullet. NL Exhaust
${modID}:JunkDrawer.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Channel !M! [B] Bullet. NL Channel !M! [R] Bullet. NL Channel !M! [G] Bullet.

${modID}:Volley.NAME: Volley
${modID}:Volley.DESCRIPTION: Bullets hit all enemies, load !M! Bullets.

${modID}:MoreOptions.NAME: More Options
${modID}:MoreOptions.DESCRIPTION: At the start of your turn, draw !M! additional card.
${modID}:MoreOptions.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Innate. NL At the start of your turn, draw !M! additional card.

${modID}:ChamberSpin.NAME: Chamber Spin
${modID}:ChamberSpin.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Draw !M! card for each unique Bullet you have.

${modID}:LetEmFly.NAME: Let Em Fly
${modID}:LetEmFly.DESCRIPTION: Fire all Bullets. NL Load 1 Bullet for each fired. NL Exhaust.
${modID}:LetEmFly.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Fire all Bullets. NL Reload each Bullet. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:MagDump.NAME: Mag Dump
${modID}:MagDump.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage to all enemies. NL Lose all Bullets.

${modID}:SliceandDice.NAME: Slice and Dice
${modID}:SliceandDice.DESCRIPTION: Gain 1 [E] for every Blade type move used.

${modID}:PotofGreed.NAME: Pot of Greed
${modID}:PotofGreed.DESCRIPTION: Draw !M! Load cards from the deck.

${modID}:JudgementDay.NAME: Judgement Day
${modID}:JudgementDay.DESCRIPTION: Ethereal. NL Shoot the next Bullet for Double Effect.
${modID}:JudgementDay.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Ethereal. NL Shoot the next Bullet for Triple Effect.
